description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, tapered, octagonal body made of orange material and two wide, white reflective stripes encircling its upper section. The cone sits on a broad, dark gray, octagonal base that appears to be weighted for stability and has a slightly textured surface. The orange body has a matte finish and shows subtle signs of surface wear, giving it a lightly used appearance. The tip of the cone is flat and solid, with no attachments or openings. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings on the cone. The overall design is utilitarian, intended for high visibility and durability in urban environments.
description: Tall orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a wide, dark gray octagonal base. The surface is matte and lightly worn, with no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange cone with two white reflective stripes and the wide, textured gray base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still showing both reflective stripes and the base, with minor changes in shadow and surface detail.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, maintaining visibility of the stripes and base, with the cone's surface texture more apparent.
description_view_3: Final view, similar to previous, highlighting the cone's symmetry and the consistent appearance of the stripes and base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal, white reflective stripes encircle the upper section of the cone, evenly spaced and of equal width.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat, solid, and orange, with no openings or attachments; it is slightly rounded at the edges.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, octagonal, and dark gray, appearing thick and weighted for stability, with a slightly rough texture.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: Lightly used, with minor surface wear and some fading but no visible cracks or damage.
